title: Apex Group supports launch of tokenised real estate fund
message_html: Apex Group supports launch of tokenised real estate fund ...
snippet: Apex Group Ltd ("Apex Group"), a global financial services provider with over $3.5 trillion in assets serviced, today announced its role in the launch of a blockchain-native real estate fund developed in collaboration with Archax, Goldman Sachs, LRC Group, and Ownera.
